steps.title: Use the colon signal
steps.content: The sentence before the underlined portion says microwave heating is an improvement over conventional thermal methods. The colon signals that the underlined portion will explain that improvement.

steps.title: Reject shifted functions
steps.content: B invents flaws in microwave technology. C focuses on why conventional methods are popular and proposes a shift, neither of which the underlined portion does. D overstates the focus as simplicity.

steps.title: Name the advantage
steps.content: The underlined portion identifies a mechanism that lets microwave heating reduce industrial cooking times compared with conventional methods. The answer is A.
